title: A Pair Trade That Should Continue To Work: TJX Companies And Williams-Sonoma
text: Williams-Sonoma shares have risen dramatically compared to TJX Companies' over the last few years due to the pandemic. While WSM shares have underperformed vs TJX recently, we believe that the underperformance could continue.

title: Department stores are at risk from an 'unprecedented' level of excess inventory, analysts say
text: Department stores, like Nordstrom Inc. JWN, -0.61% , Macy's Inc. M, +0.81% , Kohl's Corp. KSS, +5.30% and Dillard's Inc. DDS, +1.86% are at risk from what analysts call an "unprecedented" amount of merchandise. "First, retailers significantly overestimated consumer demand when it made inventory decisions for 2022," UBS analysts led by Jay Sole said.

title: The 7 Safest Blue-Chip Stocks You Can Buy Now
text: The safest blue-chip stocks have strong catalysts bolstering their upside. As inflation soars, investing in these stocks makes more sense.

title: TJX: Could Benefit From Declining Consumer Confidence, But Be Aware Of Other Headwinds
text: Declining consumer confidence is expected to have a substantial impact on the spending behaviour of the consumers. We expect reduced spending on durable goods and discretionary items, and a shift towards lower cost alternatives.

title: 4 Top Dividend Stocks To Watch In The Stock Market Today
text: Check these dividend stocks out for your watchlist right now.

title: 7 Blue-Chip Stocks With Dividends to Add to Your Q2 Buy List
text: These blue-chip stocks with dividends offer a healthy income stream and potentially strong gains through capital appreciation. The post 7 Blue-Chip Stocks With Dividends to Add to Your Q2 Buy List appeared first on InvestorPlace.

title: 3 Specialty Retailers with Special Upside
text: It's been a rough year to be a retail specialist. Fortunately, the downturn has put these high quality retail stocks on the clearance rack.
